caption: A video recording for the "HBCU DIGEST PODCAST" features a split-screen layout with three participants. On the left, Jarrett Carter Sr. wears glasses, headphones, and a black t-shirt, speaking into a professional microphone. In the center, Jennifer Mercer wears a pink t-shirt, while David Mercer wears a black and gold t-shirt and a black baseball cap. Both Mercers are positioned together in a room with bookshelves and a wall-mounted picture in the background. On-screen graphics include the "HBCU DIGEST" logo and the website "www.educationnewsflash.com". Banners at the bottom identify the guests as "Jarrett Carter Sr. @JARRETTCARTERSR" and "David & Jennifer Mercer @DIV9EFITNESS", accompanied by small circular profile photos. Throughout the clip, the participants remain in their respective positions, with Jarrett Carter Sr. and David Mercer smiling and engaging in conversation.
